meta.description: The Fluttering Sail — Diagnostic Ontology Threshold Definitions
meta.note: These thresholds define the geometric boundaries of the five diagnostic conditions. They are cited in the paper — any changes should be version-bumped and documented. All values are absolute magnitudes applied to the 8D average vector. Sensitivity analysis should be run across ±0.05 on each threshold before publication.

DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_baconian_u_min: Utility (u) must be strongly dominant. Recalibrated at 800-token lexicon coverage: averaging across matched tokens produces ~0.52 on the best extractive texts. Original 0.80 was a single-word theoretical value, not a text-average empirical value.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_baconian_t_max: Telos (t, Virtue Ethics/purpose) must be near-zero. Values above 0.15 indicate residual purposive framing that prevents a clean Baconian diagnosis. This is an absolute magnitude check — both positive and negative Telos disqualify.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_baconian_s_max: Structure (s, Deontology/duty) must be near-zero. A text with strong duty framing cannot be Baconian — it still respects principled constraint. 0.10 is intentionally tight.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_mimetic_p_min: Power (p, Political Realism) must be high. Mimetic Shear requires active dominance framing, not merely competitive language.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_mimetic_m_min: M (Mimetic/Girardian) axis does not reliably encode in political conflict vocabulary at current lexicon coverage. Condition revised to focus on P (Power) dominance with F, D, C collapse as the shear signature. Future work: add Girardian-specific vocabulary to tranche_master.json.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_mimetic_d_max: Dharma (d, cosmic order) must be collapsed. Any residual alignment with cosmic order prevents the Shear diagnosis — the key pathology is the severing of Rta.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_mimetic_c_max: Non-Dual consciousness (c, Advaita) must be collapsed. A text retaining any witness consciousness cannot be fully weaponised for tribal polarisation.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_ascetic_c_min: Non-Dual consciousness (c) must be extreme. Ascetic Drift requires near-complete dissolution into witness consciousness — set deliberately high at 0.90 to avoid false positives on merely contemplative texts.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_ascetic_t_min: Telos (t) must be extreme. The text must be strongly purpose-directed toward transcendence specifically — high Telos toward worldly ends does not qualify.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_ascetic_u_max: Utility (u) must be near-zero. The ascetic pathology is the abandonment of material welfare — any significant utilitarian framing disqualifies.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_ascetic_f_max: Fairness (f, Justice as Fairness) must be near-zero. The text must have abandoned civic procedural concerns entirely.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_equilibrium_f_min: Fairness (f) must be high. The Purushartha gold standard requires genuine procedural justice, not merely material balance.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_equilibrium_u_min: Utility (u) must be meaningfully present. The equilibrium is between material and transcendent — not purely transcendent. Slightly lower than Fairness threshold reflecting that holistic texts often subordinate utility to justice.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_equilibrium_d_min: Dharma (d) must be high. Cosmic order alignment is the core Indic criterion for equilibrium — without it the text is merely procedurally balanced, not holistically synthesised.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_equilibrium_s_min: Structure (s, Deontology) must be high. Principled duty-bound framing must be present alongside cosmic order — the equilibrium requires both Kantian duty and Dharmic order simultaneously.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_nyaya_sigma_max: Standard deviation across all 8 absolute dimension values must be low. The Nyaya Meta-Condition diagnoses epistemological stability — even distribution across all schools. 0.15 is the threshold below which the distribution is considered homogeneous. Raising this broadens the condition significantly.
DIAG_THRESHOLDS._note_nyaya_mu_min: Mean absolute magnitude across all 8 dimensions must be meaningfully high. Low sigma on near-zero values would be trivially stable — the text must also be philosophically engaged, not merely neutral. 0.40 ensures the stability is substantive.
